channel.title: Regression on Adventures in Data Science
channel.description: Recent content in Regression on Adventures in Data Science

item.title: Roadblock: Probabilities
item.description: I’ve been reading the amazing “An Introduction to Statistical Learning” to bone up on my understanding of statistics. This is one of the areas I need to develop for my project, and I’ve already done most (if not all) of DataCamp’s statistics courses.The first three chapters were challenging but not impossible, again thanks to DataCamp’s courses on regression and machine learning. Yet Another Certificate! The real benefit of this book has been helping me focus on what I need to do in order to develop this data product.
